scripts.build:core: node scripts/build-demo.mjs core && node scripts/build-sea.mjs core
scripts.build:solid: node scripts/build-demo.mjs solid && node scripts/build-sea.mjs solid
scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/run-demo.mjs both --test && node scripts/run-sea.mjs both --test
scripts.test:core: npm run build:core && node scripts/run-demo.mjs core --test && node scripts/run-sea.mjs core --test
scripts.test:solid: npm run build:solid && node scripts/run-demo.mjs solid --test && node scripts/run-sea.mjs solid --test
